creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text: A chunk of these are OBE because I taught sed how to \r, \n, \t, and \xNN in the interim. I picked up new devel/llvm* breakage when testing and opened PR 247058 for that. The rest will be addressed by https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25185, then I'll request one last run. I fully intend to power through this time, rather than neglecting it for 8-12 months...
